entry.title: Chiaki Story List
entry.content:
Interacts with refers to who Chiaki speaks with in the story ONLY.
Story Name Story Type Interacts with... Read Story At...
1st Main Story Main Ryuseitai, Eichi, Subaru
Pirate Festival Event Ryuseitai, UNDEAD
Sports Festival Event Basketball Club
Christmas Live Event Ryuseitai, 2wink
Triumph of the Emperor Event Ryuseitai, fine
Supernova Event Ryuseitai, Eichi, Jin
Beach Match Event Ryuseitai, 2wink, Rei
Scroll of the Elements Event Ryuseitai, Akatsuki
Holiday Party Event Ryuseitai, UNDEAD
Climax Event Ryuseitai, Eichi, Subaru, Kaoru
Purple Wisterias of May Event Shinobu, Kanata, Madara, Mitsuru
Shooting Star Festival Event Ryuseitai, Valkyrie
Crossroad Event Keito, Rei, Kuro, Kaoru
Sweet Halloween Event Ryuseitai, Ra*bits, MaM
SS Main Subaru
Boarding Live Event Ryuseitai, 2wink, Tsukasa
School Festival 4 Event Ryuseitai
Orihime and Hikoboshi Event Ryuseitai, Trickstar
Rainbow Main Jin, Hokuto, Tori, Madara
Saga Main Jin, Hokuto, Tori, Jun, Hiyori, Eichi, Seiya
Hot & Elegant Chocolat Fes Event Ryuseitai, Valkyrie
Meteor Impact Event Ryuseitai, Shu, Subaru, Madara, Kuro, Keito
2nd Main Story Main Ryuseitai, Rinne
Date Plan Event Kaoru, Niki, Natsume, Mitsuru
Motor Show Event Ryuseitai, Hiiro, Aira
Comet Show Event
